meta.title: Mihomo Subscription Converter
meta.description: Mihomo / Clash Meta config generator supporting Hysteria2, AnyTLS, VLESS, Trojan, VMess, Shadowsocks

header.title: Mihomo Subscription Converter
header.subtitle: Clash Meta Config Generator
header.credit: Thanks to ACL4SSR for rule sets

step1.title: Proxy Node Links
step1.placeholder:
# Paste your proxy links here, one per line:
# hysteria2://password@host:port?peer=sni&insecure=1#NodeName
# anytls://password@host:port?peer=sni&insecure=1#NodeName
# vless://uuid@host:port?security=reality&pbk=xxx&sni=xxx&fp=chrome&sid=xxx#NodeName
# trojan://password@host:port?sni=xxx#NodeName
# vmess://base64...
# ss://method:password@host:port#NodeName
step1.supported: Supported protocols: hysteria2 · anytls · vless · trojan · vmess · ss · tuic

step3.title: Custom Rules
step3.placeholder:
# Custom rules, one per line. These take highest priority.
# e.g.:
DOMAIN-SUFFIX,example.com,🚀 节点选择
IP-CIDR,1.2.3.4/32,DIRECT

generate.errorEmpty: Please enter at least one proxy link
generate.errorFailed: Generation failed. Please check your proxy link format.

result.title: Result
result.urlDescription: Paste the following URL into your Clash / Mihomo client as a remote profile:
usageItems: Paste the URL into Clash for Windows / Mihomo Party / Stash or any compatible client
The URL dynamically generates the latest config — re-generate whenever you update your nodes
Rule sets are powered by ACL4SSR and downloaded automatically by the client on first load

fields.hysteria2: peer/sni: SNI hostname · insecure: skip cert verification
fields.anytls: peer/sni: SNI hostname · fastopen: TCP fast open · fp: fingerprint
fields.vless: pbk: public key · sid: shortId · sni: SNI · fp: fingerprint
fields.trojan: sni: SNI hostname · insecure: skip cert verification

footer: Mihomo Subconverter · For personal use only

Gaming.label: 🎮 Gaming
